title: Docking unit, connector unit, and dc power supply assembly
abstract: The invention relates to a docking unit (1) for a DC power supply allowing continuous power supply to an electrical device or charging of an electrical device if the docking unit is associated with the DC power supply. The docking unit comprises a first housing (2) provided with a docking space (4) for receiving a magnetic plug part (28) of a connector unit (26) if the docking unit is in use. The docking unit comprises a magneto-mechanical locking mechanism (5) for establishing a magnetic locking connection and a mechanical locking connection between the magnetic plug part and the docking unit. The invention also relates to a connector unit (26) that is compatible with the docking unit according to the invention, and to a DC power supply assembly (47) comprising the docking unit (1) and the connector unit (26) according to the invention.
claims:
Claims 1. A docking unit (1) for a DC power supply, the docking unit (1) being configured to allow continuous power supply to an electrical device or charging of an electrical device if the docking unit (1) is associated with a DC power supply, the docking unit (1) comprising a first housing (2) that is provided with a docking space (4) for receiving a magnetic plug part of a connector unit if the docking unit (1) is in use, the first housing (2) comprising a magneto-mechanical locking mechanism (5) that is configured and arranged to allow establishment of a magnetic locking connection and a mechanical locking connection between the magnetic plug part and the docking unit (1). 2. The docking unit (1) according to claim 1 , wherein the magneto-mechanical locking mechanism (5) is configured and arranged to allow magnetically-induced alignment of the magnetic plug part and the docking unit (1) relative to each other. 3. The docking unit (1) according to claim 1 or 2, wherein the magneto-mechanical locking mechanism (5) comprises a first set of locking components, the first set of locking components comprising a first mechanical locking element (6) and a first magnet (7), the first mechanical locking element (6) and the first magnet (7) being arranged relative to the docking space (4) and relative to each other to allow the first mechanical locking element (6) and the first magnet (7) to be in a first magnetic retaining connection, wherein as a result of the first magnetic retaining connection, the first mechanical locking element (6) is arranged to partially extend into the docking space (4) at a first location for allowing establishment of the mechanical locking connection between the magnetic plug part and the docking unit (1), wherein the first magnet (7) allows magnetically-induced alignment of the magnetic plug part and the docking unit (1) relative to each other, and establishment of the magnetic locking connection between the magnetic plug part and the docking unit (1). 4. The docking unit (1) according to claim 3, wherein the first housing (2) comprises a first wall part (8) that is configured and arranged to provide a back plate for the docking space (4), and a first side wall part (9) that is arranged in contact with the first wall part (8), the first side wall part (9) being configured to provide a circular side wall surrounding the docking space (4), the first side wall part (9) being provided with a 

first opening (10) that is configured and arranged to allow a first part (6a) of the first mechanical locking element (6) to extend into the docking space (4) at the first location, and to retain a second part (6b) of the first mechanical locking element (6) behind the first side wall part (9), and wherein the first housing (2) is provided with a first guideway (11) that is configured and arranged to contain the first mechanical locking element (6), and to allow movement of the first mechanical locking element (6) between a first position in which the first part (6a) of the first mechanical locking element (6) is arranged to extend into the docking space (4) via the first opening (10) in the first side wall part (9), and a second position in which the first part (6a) of the first mechanical locking element (6) is arranged outside the docking space (4). 5. The docking unit (1) according to claim 3 or 4, wherein the magneto-mechanical locking mechanism (5) comprises a second set of locking components, the second set of locking components comprising a second mechanical locking element (12) and a second magnet (13), the second mechanical locking element (12) and the second magnet (13) being arranged relative to the docking space (4) and relative to each other to allow the second mechanical locking element (12) and the second magnet (13) to be in a second magnetic retaining connection, wherein as a result of the second magnetic retaining connection, the second mechanical locking element (12) is arranged to partially extend into the docking space (4) at a second location, the second location of the second mechanical locking element (12) being different than the first location of the first mechanical locking element (6), the first mechanical locking element (6) and the second mechanical locking element (12) allow establishment of the mechanical locking connection between the magnetic plug part and the docking unit (1), wherein the first magnet (7) of the first set of locking components and the second magnet (13) allow magnetically-induced self-alignment of the magnetic plug part and the docking unit (1) relative to each other, and establishment of the magnetic locking connection between the magnetic plug part and the docking unit (1). 6. The docking unit (1) according to claim 5, wherein the first side wall part (9) is provided with a second opening (14) that is configured and arranged to allow a third part (12a) of the second mechanical locking element (12) to extend into the docking space (4) at the second location, and to retain a fourth part (12b) of the second mechanical locking element (12) behind the first side wall part (9), and wherein the 

first housing (2) is provided with a second guideway (15) that is configured and arranged to contain the second mechanical locking element (12), and to allow movement of the second mechanical locking element (12) between a third position in which the third part (12a) of the second mechanical locking element (12) is arranged to extend into the docking space (4) via the second opening (14) in the first side wall part (9), and a fourth position in which the third part (12a) of the second mechanical locking element (12) is arranged outside the docking space (4). 7. The docking unit (1) according to claim 5 or 6, wherein the magneto-mechanical locking mechanism (5) comprises a third set of locking components, the third set of locking components comprising a third mechanical locking element (16) and a third magnet (17), the third mechanical locking element (16) and the third magnet (17) being arranged relative to the docking space (4) and relative to each other to allow the third mechanical locking element (16) and the third magnet (17) to be in a third magnetic retaining connection, wherein as a result of the third magnetic retaining connection, the third mechanical locking element (16) is arranged to partially extend into the docking space (4) at a third location, the third location being different than the first location of the first mechanical locking element (6) of the first set of locking components and the second location of the second mechanical locking element (12) of the second set of locking components, the first mechanical locking element (6), the second mechanical locking element (12), and the third mechanical locking element (16) allow establishment of the mechanical locking connection between the magnetic plug part and the docking unit (1), wherein the first magnet (7) of the first set of locking components, the second magnet (13) of the second set of locking components, and the third magnet (17) allow magnetically-induced self-alignment of the magnetic plug part and the docking unit (1) relative to each other, and establishment of the magnetic locking connection between the magnetic plug part and the docking unit (1). 8. The docking unit (1) according to claim 7, wherein the first side wall part (9) is provided with a third opening (18) that is configured and arranged to allow a fifth part (16a) of the third mechanical locking element (16) to extend into the docking space (4) at the third location, and to retain a sixth part (16b) of the third mechanical locking element (16) behind the first side wall part (9), and wherein the first housing (2) is provided with a third guideway (19) that is configured and arranged to contain the third mechanical locking element (16), and to allow movement of the third mechanical 

locking element (16) between a fifth position in which the fifth part (16a) of the third mechanical locking element (16) is arranged to extend into the docking space (4) via the third opening (18) in the first side wall part (9), and a sixth position in which the fifth part (16a) of the third mechanical locking element (16) is arranged outside the docking space (4). 9. The docking unit (1) according to claim 7 or 8, wherein the magneto-mechanical locking mechanism (5) comprises a fourth set of locking components, the fourth set of locking components comprising a fourth mechanical locking element (20) and a fourth magnet (21), the fourth mechanical locking element (20) and the fourth magnet (21) being arranged relative to the docking space (4) and relative to each other to allow the fourth mechanical locking element (20) and the fourth magnet (21) to be in a fourth magnetic retaining connection, wherein as a result of the fourth magnetic retaining connection, the fourth mechanical locking element (20) is arranged to partially extend into the docking space (4) at a fourth location, the fourth location being different than the first location of the first mechanical locking element (6) of the first set of locking components, the second location of the second mechanical locking element (12) of the second set of locking components, and the third location of the third mechanical locking element (16) of the third set of locking components, the first mechanical locking element (6), the second mechanical locking element (12), the third mechanical locking element (16), and the fourth mechanical locking element (20) allowing establishment of the mechanical locking connection between the magnetic plug part and the docking unit (1), wherein the first magnet (7) of the first set of locking components, the second magnet (13) of the second set of locking components, the third magnet (17) of the third set of locking components, and the fourth magnet (21) allow magnetically-induced self-alignment of the magnetic plug part and the docking unit (1) relative to each other, and establishment of the magnetic locking connection between the magnetic plug part and the docking unit (1). 10. The docking unit (1) according to claim 9, wherein the first side wall part (9) is provided with a fourth opening (22) that is configured and arranged to allow a seventh part (20a) of the fourth mechanical locking element (20) to extend into the docking space (4) at the fourth location, and to retain an eighth part (20b) of the fourth mechanical locking element (20) behind the first side wall part (9), and wherein the first housing (2) is provided with a fourth guideway (23) that is configured and 

arranged to contain the fourth mechanical locking element (20), and to allow movement of the fourth mechanical locking element (20) between a seventh position in which the seventh part (20a) of the fourth mechanical locking element (20) is arranged to extend into the docking space (4) via the fourth opening (22) in the first side wall part (9), and an eighth position in which the seventh part (22a) of the fourth mechanical locking element (22) is arranged outside the docking space (4). 11. The docking unit (1) according to any one of the claims 4 to 10, wherein the first wall part (8) is provided with a first set of electrical contacts (24) that are arranged to project from the first wall part (8) into the docking space (4). 12. The docking unit (1) according to any one of the claims 4 to 11 , wherein the first wall part (8) is provided with a first protrusion (25) that is arranged to project from the first wall part (8) into the docking space (4). 13. The docking unit (1) according to any one of the claims 4 to 12, wherein the first side wall part (9) of the first housing (2) is configured to have a first shape that allows a snug fit of the magnetic plug part of the connector unit in the docking space (4), and rotation of the connector unit and the docking unit (1) relative to each other. 14. The docking unit (1) according to claim 13, wherein the first shape of the first side wall part (9) of the first housing (2) is a circle. 15. The docking unit (1) according to any one of the claims 4 to 12, wherein the first side wall part (9) of the first housing (2) is configured to have a second shape that allows a snug fit of the magnetic plug part of the connector unit in the docking space (4), and prevents rotation of the connector unit and the docking unit (1) relative to each other. 16. The docking unit (1) according to claim 15, wherein the second shape of the first side wall part (9) of first housing (2) is a closed shape having any number of sides. 17. A connector unit (26) that is compatible with a docking unit (1) according to any one of the claims 1 to 16, the connector unit (26) comprising a second housing (27) that is provided with: 

 a magnetic plug part (28) that, if the connector unit (26) is in use, is inserted into a docking space of a docking unit, the magnetic plug part (28) comprising: â¢ a second wall part (29) that is provided with a recessed area (30) to provide the second wall part with a rim part (31), the recessed area (30) has a first surface (32) that is arranged to face away from the second housing (27) and a second surface (33) that is arranged to face towards the second housing (27), the rim part (31) being configured to surround the first surface (32) of the recessed area (30); â¢ a second side wall part (34) that is connected to the rim part (31) of the second wall part (29), the second side wall part (34) having a first portion (35) that is in contact with a first mechanical locking element of the docking unit upon establishment of a mechanical locking connection between the magnetic plug part (28) and the docking unit; â¢ a fifth magnet (36) that is arranged at a ninth position at the second surface (33) of the recessed area (30) of the second wall part (29), the fifth magnet (36) being configured to allow magnetically-induced alignment with a first magnet of the docking unit, and, upon insertion of the magnetic plug part (28) into the docking space of the docking unit, establishment of a magnetic locking connection between the magnetic plug part (28) and the docking unit; â¢ a set of concentrically arranged closed-loop electrical contacts (37) that are arranged on the first surface (32) of the recessed area (30) of the second wall part (29), wherein upon insertion of the magnetic plug part (28) into the docking space of the docking unit, the concentrically arranged closed-loop electrical contacts (37) are electrically connected with electrical contacts that are arranged to project from a first wall part of a first housing of the docking unit into the docking space of the docking unit; and a device mounting part (38) that is arranged at a different side of the second housing (27) than the magnetic plug part (28), the device mounting part (38) being configured to receive a part of an electrical device or an adapter for connecting an electrical device to the connector unit (26). 18. The connector unit (26) according to claim 17, wherein the magnetic plug part (28) comprises a sixth magnet (43) that is arranged at a tenth position at the second surface (33) of the recessed area (30) of the second wall part (29), the tenth position being different than the ninth position of the fifth magnet (36), wherein the fifth magnet 

(36) and the sixth magnet (43) are configured to allow magnetically-induced selfalignment with the first magnet and a second magnet of the docking unit, and, upon insertion of the magnetic plug part (28) into the docking space of the docking unit, establishment of the magnetic locking connection and the mechanical locking connection between the magnetic plug part (28) and the docking unit. 19. The connector unit (26) according to claim 18, wherein the magnetic plug part (28) comprises a seventh magnet (44) that is arranged at an eleventh position at the second surface (33) of the recessed area (30) of the second wall part (29), the eleventh position being different than the ninth position of the fifth magnet (36) and the tenth position of the sixth magnet (43), wherein the fifth magnet (36), the sixth magnet (43) and the seventh magnet (44) are configured to allow magnetically- induced self-alignment with the first magnet, the second magnet, and a third magnet of the docking unit, and, upon insertion of the magnetic plug part (28) into the docking space of the docking unit, establishment of the magnetic locking connection and the mechanical locking connection between the magnetic plug part (28) and the docking unit. 20. The connector unit (26) according to claim 19, wherein the magnetic plug part (28) comprises an eighth magnet (45) that is arranged at a twelfth position at the second surface (33) of the recessed area (30) of the second wall part (29), the twelfth position being different than the ninth position of the fifth magnet (36), the tenth position of the sixth magnet (43), and the eleventh position of the seventh magnet (44), wherein the fifth magnet (36), the sixth magnet (43), the seventh magnet (44), and the eighth magnet (45) are configured to allow magnetically-induced selfalignment with the first magnet, the second magnet, the third magnet, and a fourth magnet of the docking unit, and, upon insertion of the magnetic plug part (28) into the docking space of the docking unit, establishment of the magnetic locking connection and the mechanical locking connection between the magnetic plug part (28) and the docking unit. 21. The connector unit (26) according to any one of the claims 17 to 20, wherein the rim part (31) of the second wall part (29) of the magnetic plug part (28) is provided with a first recess (46) that is configured to allow reception of a first protrusion that is arranged to project from the first wall part of the first housing of the docking unit into 

the docking space of the docking unit upon establishment of the magnetic locking connection and the mechanical locking connection between the magnetic plug part (28) and the docking unit. 22. The connector unit (26) according to any one of the claims 17 to 21, wherein the second side wall part (34) of the magnetic plug part (28) has a closed shape with any number of sides. 23. A DC power supply assembly (47) for continuous provision of DC power to an electrical device or charging with DC power of an electrical device if the DC power supply assembly (47) is in use, the DC power supply assembly comprising a docking unit (1) according to any one of the claims 1 to 16. 24. The DC power supply assembly (47) according to claim 23, comprising a connector unit (26) according to any one of the claims 17 to 22. 25. The DC power supply assembly (47) according to claim 24, wherein a first side wall part (9) of a first housing (2) of a docking unit (1) has a third shape and a second side wall part (34) of a magnetic plug part (28) of the connector unit (26) has a fourth shape, the third shape and the fourth shape being adapted to each other to enable, upon rotation of the connector unit (26) and the docking unit (1) relative to each other, a movement of a first mechanical locking element (6) of the docking unit (1) from a first position in which a first part (6a) of the first mechanical locking element (6) is arranged to extend into a docking space (4) of the docking unit (1) to a second position in which the first part (6a) of the first mechanical locking element (6) is arranged outside the docking space (4) for cancelling of a mechanical locking connection between the magnetic plug part (28) of the connector unit (26) and the docking unit (1). 26. The DC power supply assembly (47) according to claim 25, wherein the third shape of the first side wall part (9) of the first housing (2) of the docking unit (1) is a circle, and the fourth shape of the second side wall part (34) of the magnetic plug part 27. The DC power supply assembly (47) according to claim 24, wherein a first side wall part (9) of the first housing (2) of the docking unit (1) has a fifth shape and a second side wall part (34) of a magnetic plug part (28) of the connector unit (26) has a sixth shape, the fifth shape and the sixth shape being adapted to each other to prevent rotation of the connector unit (26) and the docking unit (1) relative to each other, and to prevent cancelling of a mechanical locking connection between the magnetic plug part (28) of the connector unit (26) and the docking unit (1). 28. The DC power supply assembly (47) according to claim 27, wherein the fifth shape of the first side wall part (9) of the first housing (2) of the docking unit (1) and the sixth shape of the second side wall part (34) of the magnetic plug part (28) of the connector unit (26) are closed shapes having a same number of sides. 29. The DC power supply assembly (47) according to claim 27 or 28, comprising a magnetic unlocking tool (48) that is arranged relative to a magneto-mechanical locking mechanism (5) of the docking unit (1) to allow cancelling of a first magnetic retaining connection between a first mechanical locking element (6) and a first magnet (7) of the docking unit (1), and thereby cancelling of the mechanical locking connection between the magnetic plug part (28) of the connector unit (26) and the docking unit (1).
